title: Capybara Crosshair
description: A cute capybara crosshair for your game!
body:
Change your crosshair to a cute little capybara!

May also work for later versions (tried and tested on 1.21.10)

Please note: If you change your GUI size the crosshair may also change size!

Any issues at all please let me know, thank you! Enjoy!

![Capybara Crosshair in action!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e556e83e3a3d6cea98ba06712383aa035dae97e0.jpeg)
